## DayZ Server Manager v1.0.0

First public release for Windows game hosts.

### Download (no build required)

Download **`dayz_manager-v1.0.0-windows-x64.zip`** below. It includes:

- `DayZManager.exe`
- `bercon-cli.exe`
- `config/config-host-template.json` — copy to `config\config.json` and edit

See [docs/RELEASES.md](https://github.com/devmrbouh-hub/dayz_manager/blob/main/docs/RELEASES.md) for install steps.

### Highlights

- Web UI (EN/RU), REST API, log WebSockets
- Multiple DayZ servers on one host
- WatchDog, planned restart, SteamCMD mod sync
- RCON: say, lock, kick, graceful shutdown
- Live stats (FPS, players) and in-game chat on server card

### Requirements

- Windows, DayZ Dedicated Server, SteamCMD
- BattlEye RCON configured; set `auth.api_key` in config (not the default placeholder)
